title: General Science: Earth & Space
description: Questions about our planet, solar system, and the universe beyond.
subject: Science

questions.prompt: How many planets are in our solar system?
questions.explanation: Since Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet in 2006, our solar system officially has 8 planets.

questions.prompt: What is the closest star to Earth (other than the Sun)?
questions.explanation: Proxima Centauri is the nearest star to the Sun, about 4.24 light-years away. It is part of the Alpha Centauri star system.

questions.prompt: What layer of the atmosphere do weather phenomena primarily occur in?
questions.explanation: The troposphere is the lowest layer of Earth's atmosphere, extending to about 12 km altitude, where most weather occurs.

questions.prompt: What causes the seasons on Earth?
questions.explanation: Earth's axial tilt of about 23.5° causes different hemispheres to receive more direct sunlight at different times of the year.

questions.prompt: What is the chemical symbol for water?
questions.explanation: Water is composed of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom, giving it the chemical formula H₂O.
